mechanics.excerpt: Capellan charac: ter has the Stigma Servitor Caste Trait and may not purchase (or receive through events) the Owns Vehicle Wealth; Well: Connected or Well-Equipped traits. Path Restrictions: The following paths have a additional prerequisite of Capellan citizenship Capellan characters: Military School (Stage 21 and all Stage 3 paths plus all Stage paths except Ne'er-Do-Well (P. 48).
